title: pelargonium × carbonatum
intro: Pelargonium × carbonatum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid of the Pelargonium species, a type of flowering plant in the geranium family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and anxiety, as well as its antiseptic and antifungal qualities. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
